examples: Sauerkraut is cabbage fermented in its own juice.
People in Germany eat their cabbage in sauerkraut form.
All naturally fermented products are good: live yogurt, sauerkraut, natural vinegar, etc.
In 1945 Marvin Sands started making fruit wine in bulk in a converted sauerkraut factory.
Probiotics, found in yoghurt or sauerkraut, have been shown to aid your digestive system.
